content.text: Build a high-energy landing page for an underground electronic music event that rejects standard grid layouts in favor of asymmetric, glitch-inspired compositions. Use bold typography and stark color blocking to convey a chaotic yet curated vibe, ensuring every design choice feels intentional and distinct rather than templated. Implement all styling and structure from scratch within the provided workspace.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to build a high-energy landing page for an underground electronic music event. Let me break down the requirements:

1. Asymmetric, glitch-inspired compositions (rejecting standard grid layouts)
2. Bold typography and stark color blocking
3. Chaotic yet curated vibe
4. Every design choice intentional and distinct
5. All styling and structure from scratch

Let me create a single HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript that pushes the boundaries of web design. I'll think about:

- Color palette: Think neon on dark backgrounds - maybe electric cyan, hot pink, acid green against deep blacks
- Typography: Mix of oversized display fonts with monospace for that raw/industrial feel
- Layout: Off-kilter sections, rotated elements, overlapping content, broken grids
- Glitch effects: CSS animations that mimic digital distortion, scanlines, chromatic aberration
- Energy: Sharp angles, diagonal dividers, bold transitions

Let me craft something truly distinctive.

arguments.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>VOID SIGNAL // 2026</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Anton&family=Inter:wght@300;900&display=swap');

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     RESET & BASE
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  :root {
    --void: #0a0a0a;
    --acid: #c8ff00;
    --blood: #ff1a5f;
    --ice: #00f0ff;
    --bone: #f0ece2;
    --rot: #b534f2;
    --smoke: #1a1a1a;
    --glow-acid: 0 0 30px rgba(200, 255, 0, .4);
    --glow-blood: 0 0 30px rgba(255, 26, 95, .4);
    --glow-ice: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 240, 255, .4);
  }

  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    scrollbar-width: thin;
    scrollbar-color: var(--acid) var(--void);
  }

  body {
    background: var(--void);
    color: var(--bone);
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: crosshair;
  }

  ::selection {
    background: var(--acid);
    color: var(--void);
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     GLITCH ANIMATION KEYFRAMES
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  @keyframes glitch-1 {
    0%, 100% { clip-path: inset(0 0 95% 0); transform: translate(-2px, 2px); }
    10% { clip-path: inset(20% 0 60% 0); transform: translate(2px, -1px); }
    20% { clip-path: inset(50% 0 30% 0); transform: translate(-1px, 3px); }
    30% { clip-path: inset(10% 0 80% 0); transform: translate(3px, 0); }
    40% { clip-path: inset(70% 0 5% 0); transform: translate(-3px, 1px); }
    50% { clip-path: inset(40% 0 40% 0); transform: translate(1px, -2px); }
    60% { clip-path: inset(60% 0 20% 0); transform: translate(-2px, 0); }
    70% { clip-path: inset(5% 0 70% 0); transform: translate(2px, 2px); }
    80% { clip-path: inset(80% 0 10% 0); transform: translate(-1px, -1px); }
    90% { clip-path: inset(30% 0 50% 0); transform: translate(0, 3px); }
  }

  @keyframes glitch-2 {
    0%, 100% { clip-path: inset(95% 0 0 0); transform: translate(2px, -2px); }
    15% { clip-path: inset(60% 0 20% 0); transform: translate(-3px, 1px); }
    30% { clip-path: inset(80% 0 5% 0); transform: translate(1px, -3px); }
    45% { clip-path: inset(30% 0 50% 0); transform: translate(-2px, 2px); }
    60% { clip-path: inset(50% 0 30% 0); transform: translate(3px, 0); }
    75% { clip-path: inset(15% 0 70% 0); transform: translate(-1px, -2px); }
    90% { clip-path: inset(40% 0 40% 0); transform: translate(2px, 1px); }
  }

  @keyframes flicker {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    41% { opacity: 1; }
    42% { opacity: 0.8; }
    43% { opacity: 1; }
    45% { opacity: 0.3; }
    46% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 1; }
    51% { opacity: 0.7; }
    52% { opacity: 1; }
    92% { opacity: 1; }
    93% { opacity: 0.5; }
    94% { opacity: 1; }
  }

  @keyframes scanline {
    0% { transform: translateY(-100%); }
    100% { transform: translateY(100vh); }
  }

  @keyframes pulse-border {
    0%, 100% { border-color: var(--acid); }
    33% { border-color: var(--blood); }
    66% { border-color: var(--ice); }
  }

  @keyframes rotate-slow {
    from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    0% { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  @keyframes text-slide-up {
    0% { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
  }

  @keyframes noise-shift {
    0%, 100% { background-position: 0 0; }
    25% { background-position: 50% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: -25% 75%; }
    75% { background-position: 75% 25%; }
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     SCANLINE OVERLAY
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .scanline-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 2px,
      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 2px,
      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 4px
    );
  }

  .scanline-overlay::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%; height: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.04), transparent);
    animation: scanline 4s linear infinite;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     NOISE TEXTURE BG
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .noise-bg {
    position: fixed;
    top: -50%; left: -50%;
    width: 200%; height: 200%;
    z-index: -1;
    opacity: 0.035;
    pointer-events: none;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    animation: noise-shift 0.5s steps(10) infinite;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVIGATION — asymmetric floating pill
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 2rem;
    right: 2rem;
    z-index: 1000;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }

  nav ul {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;
  }

  nav li {
    position: relative;
  }

  nav a {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--bone);
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem;
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  nav a::before {
    content: '//';
    margin-right: 0.4rem;
    color: var(--acid);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }

  nav a:hover::before {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  nav a:hover {
    color: var(--acid);
    background: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.05);
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO SECTION — massive asymmetry
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Massive title block — spans columns weirdly */
  .hero-title-block {
    grid-column: 1 / 3;
    grid-row: 1;
    padding: 8vh 5vw 0 3vw;
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-date-stamp {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 1vw, 0.85rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.5em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--acid);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    display: inline-block;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--acid);
    padding-left: 1.2rem;
    animation: flicker 8s infinite;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 15vw, 14rem);
    line-height: 0.85;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    color: var(--bone);
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-title .glitch-layer {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    display: block;
  }

  .hero-title .layer-cyan {
    color: var(--ice);
    animation: glitch-1 3s infinite linear alternate-reverse;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .hero-title .layer-magenta {
    color: var(--blood);
    animation: glitch-2 2.5s infinite linear alternate-reverse;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .hero-title .layer-main {
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.4);
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    max-width: 40ch;
  }

  /* Hero image block — offset into 3rd column */
  .hero-visual {
    grid-column: 3;
    grid-row: 1 / 3;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-visual::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(135deg, var(--acid) 0%, transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(225deg, var(--blood) 0%, transparent 40%);
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .hero-visual-inner {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 60vh;
    background:
      linear-gradient(45deg, var(--smoke) 25%, transparent 25%),
      linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--smoke) 25%, transparent 25%),
      linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--smoke) 75%),
      linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--smoke) 75%);
    background-size: 20px 20px;
    background-position: 0 0, 0 10px, 10px -10px, -10px 0;
    opacity: 0.5;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .hero-visual-symbol {
    font-size: 12rem;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    color: var(--void);
    opacity: 0.15;
    animation: rotate-slow 20s linear infinite;
  }

  /* Side info — floating far right */
  .hero-info-side {
    grid-column: 3;
    grid-row: 3;
    position: relative;
    padding: 2rem 1rem;
    margin-top: -2vh;
  }

  .hero-info-side .side-tag {
    writing-mode: vertical-rl;
    text-orientation: mixed;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.3);
    padding-right: 1rem;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.15);
  }

  /* Diagonal divider */
  .diagonal-divider {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    right: 30%;
    width: 2px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--acid), var(--blood), transparent);
    transform: skewX(-12deg);
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 3;
  }

  .diagonal-divider:nth-of-type(2) {
    right: 32%;
    transform: skewX(-12deg) scaleX(0.5);
    opacity: 0.15;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--ice), transparent);
  }

  /* Floating coordinate block */
  .coord-block {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 3vh;
    left: 5vw;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.2);
    line-height: 2;
    z-index: 5;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     MARQUEE STRIP — brutalist ticker
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .marquee-strip {
    background: var(--acid);
    color: var(--void);
    padding: 0.8rem 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
    position: relative;
    transform: rotate(-1.5deg) scale(1.03);
    margin: 4rem -2vw;
    z-index: 10;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .marquee-strip::before,
  .marquee-strip::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    width: 15vw;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .marquee-strip::before {
    left: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--void), transparent);
  }

  .marquee-strip::after {
    right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to left, var(--void), transparent);
  }

  .marquee-content {
    display: inline-block;
    animation: marquee 20s linear infinite;
  }

  .marquee-content span {
    margin-right: 3rem;
  }

  .marquee-content .separator {
    color: var(--blood);
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    margin: 0 1rem;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     LINEUP — staggered card chaos
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .lineup-section {
    padding: 12vh 5vw;
    position: relative;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.5em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--acid);
    margin-bottom: 4rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1.5rem;
  }

  .section-label::before {
    content: '';
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--acid);
  }

  .section-number {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
    line-height: 1;
    color: transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.15);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .lineup-grid {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  /* Each artist is an asymmetric row */
  .artist-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr auto;
    align-items: baseline;
    padding: 3rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.06);
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
    cursor: default;
  }

  .artist-row:hover {
    padding-left: 2rem;
    border-bottom-color: var(--acid);
  }

  .artist-row.featured {
    grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
    padding: 5rem 0;
    border-bottom: none;
    position: relative;
  }

  .artist-row.featured::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 60px;
    height: 4px;
    background: var(--blood);
  }

  .artist-row.main-headliner {
    grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr auto;
    padding: 6rem 0;
    border-bottom: none;
  }

  .artist-time {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.25);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .artist-name {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
    line-height: 1;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    transition: all 0.4s;
  }

  .artist-row:hover .artist-name {
    color: var(--acid);
    transform: translateX(0.5rem);
  }

  .artist-row.main-headliner .artist-name {
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
    color: var(--bone);
    text-shadow:
      4px 0 var(--ice),
      -4px 0 var(--blood);
    animation: flicker 6s infinite;
  }

  .artist-genre {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.3);
    padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.15);
    margin-left: 2rem;
  }

  .featured-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .featured-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.55rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--bone);
    background: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.1);
    padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
  }

  /* Stagger visual offsets */
  .artist-row:nth-child(2) { margin-left: 4vw; }
  .artist-row:nth-child(3) { margin-left: -2vw; }
  .artist-row:nth-child(4) { margin-left: 6vw; }
  .artist-row:nth-child(5) { margin-left: 1vw; }
  .artist-row:nth-child(6) { margin-left: -4vw; }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     LOCATION BLOCK — bold color field
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .location-section {
    position: relative;
    margin: 0 -2vw;
    padding: 10vh 5vw;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .location-bg-block {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 65%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--smoke);
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 85% 100%, 0 100%);
  }

  .location-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4rem;
  }

  .location-title {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  }

  .location-title .accent {
    color: var(--acid);
  }

  .location-details {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 3rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .detail-block {
    border-left: 2px solid var(--blood);
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
  }

  .detail-label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.3);
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }

  .detail-value {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .detail-value.accent {
    color: var(--ice);
  }

  .detail-value.blood {
    color: var(--blood);
  }

  /* Coordinates decoration */
  .coordinates-float {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    color: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.15);
    writing-mode: vertical-rl;
    position: absolute;
    right: 5vw;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(180deg);
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     INFO CARDS — skewed, offset blocks
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .info-section {
    padding: 12vh 5vw;
  }

  .info-grid {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .info-card {
    position: relative;
    padding: 4rem 3rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.06);
    transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .info-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 4px;
    height: 0;
    transition: height 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
  }

  .info-card:nth-child(1)::before { background: var(--acid); }
  .info-card:nth-child(2)::before { background: var(--blood); }
  .info-card:nth-child(3)::before { background: var(--ice); }

  .info-card:hover::before {
    height: 100%;
  }

  .info-card:hover {
    transform: translateX(1rem) skewX(-1deg);
    border-color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.12);
    background: rgba(200, 255, 0, 0.01);
  }

  .info-card:nth-child(2) {
    margin-left: 8vw;
  }

  .info-card:nth-child(3) {
    margin-left: -4vw;
  }

  .info-card-number {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 5rem;
    line-height: 1;
    color: transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.08);
    position: absolute;
    top: 1rem;
    right: 2rem;
  }

  .info-card-icon {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .info-card-title {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .info-card-text {
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: rgba(240, 236, 226, 0.5);
    max-width: 35ch;
  }

  /* ════════════════════════════════════════
     TICKER CTA — urgent call to action
     ════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .cta-section {
    position: relative;
    padding: 15vh 5vw;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cta-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--blood);
    clip-path: polygon(30% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    opacity: 0.08;
  }

  .cta-big-text {
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 12rem);
